sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86588" key="proaneuru/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαν-ευρύνω</orth>, <sense id="n86588.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dilate beforehand,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προσ-</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
